summary: Added SPROCKET_CLUB=<subdomain> env shorthand (validated as a bare hostname label) that targets https://<subdomain>.sprocketsports.com; SPROCKET_BASE_URL still wins.
reason: Sprocket is multi-tenant; the CLI defaults to jfcsoccer but must work for any club. SPROCKET_BASE_URL alone required a full URL; the shorthand is friendlier.
validated_outcome: doctor --json shows the base URL retargeting to the chosen club; default stays jfcsoccer.
